title: The Knight's Oath
subtitle: A Choose Your Own Adventure Prelude

rose.name: Rose
negative: Est Sularus oth Mithas — remember your oath.

pages.title: THE WORLD OF KRYNN
body: Krynn is a world of high towers and deep shadows, of gods who once walked among mortals and a sky scarred by divine wrath.

The continent of Ansalon stretches from the frozen wastes of Icereach to the ancient forests of Silvanesti. Great cities once rose along its coasts and rivers — Istar the Mighty, Xak Tsaroth the Beautiful, Tarsis the Shining.
Once, this was a world of wonders.
That was before the Cataclysm.

pages.title: THE CATACLYSM
body: Three hundred years ago, the Kingpriest of Istar grew so proud that he demanded godhood itself. In answer, the gods hurled a fiery mountain upon the city. Istar sank beneath the Blood Sea. Coastlines shattered. Nations drowned.
Then the gods fell silent.

No cleric could heal. No prayer was answered. The constellations of the gods vanished from the night sky. For three centuries, the people of Ansalon have lived without divine magic — and many have concluded the gods were never real at all.
The Knights of Solamnia, once the greatest force of good on Krynn, were blamed for failing to prevent the Cataclysm. They retreated to their strongholds, diminished and despised.

pages.title: THE SOLAMNIC ORDERS
body: Yet the Knights endure. Three orders bound by the Oath and the Measure:
The Order of the Crown — honour, obedience, loyalty. Every squire begins here.
The Order of the Sword — courage, heroism, faith. The martial heart of the knighthood.
The Order of the Rose — wisdom, justice, sacrifice. The highest calling.
“Est Sularus oth Mithas” — My honour is my life.
You are a squire of the Crown, stationed in the frontier village of Vogler. Your training is nearly complete. Your trials have not yet begun.

pages.title: THE DRAGON ARMIES
body: Rumours have reached Vogler from the east. Entire nations have fallen to a horde that marches under banners of five colours — red, blue, green, black, and white.
They call themselves the Dragon Armies. The refugees say they are led by Dragon Highlords, warlords of terrible power who ride upon dragons thought extinct since the Age of Dreams.

The Solamnic command dismisses most of this as peasant hysteria. Vogler is far from the front. The harvest festival approaches. There is a bridge to defend, oaths to uphold, and a village that trusts its knights.
But the smoke on the horizon is not a rumour.

pages.title: YOUR STORY BEGINS
body: You are young. You have trained with sword and shield since childhood. You have memorised the Measure, recited the Oath, and sworn to protect those who cannot protect themselves.
Today, you must choose your path.
As a Fighter, you will master the art of war — tactical brilliance, unmatched endurance, and the discipline of a soldier born.
As a Paladin, you will reach for something the world has forgotten — divine magic. If the gods are truly returning, you may be among the first to hear their call in three hundred years.
Either way, the Dragon Armies are coming. And Vogler will need its knight.
